answer: The Health and Human Services Commission leads spending among top Texas agencies with $62.66 billion, accounting for 33.1% of the top 100 expenditures. The Texas Education Agency follows at $42.38 billion (22.4%), while the Texas Department of Transportation spends $19.32 billion (10.2%). The Teacher Retirement System and Texas Workforce Commission spend $14.25 billion (7.5%) and $5.69 billion (3.0%), respectively.
